name: V60
technique_notes: Bloom with 3x coffee weight for 30s. Pour in slow concentric circles, keeping water level consistent. Finish with a gentle center pour. Aim for 2:30-3:30 total drawdown.

brew_steps.label: Bloom
brew_steps.instruction: Pour 3x coffee weight to bloom, let degas

brew_steps.label: Second Pour
brew_steps.instruction: Pour in slow concentric circles, keeping water level consistent

brew_steps.label: Final Pour
brew_steps.instruction: Gentle center pour to finish

brew_steps.label: Drawdown
brew_steps.instruction: Let bed drain until surface is nearly dry

name: Aeropress
technique_notes: Inverted method: Add coffee, then water. Stir for 10s. Steep 60s. Flip and press gently over 30s.

brew_steps.label: Add Coffee
brew_steps.instruction: Add coffee grounds to Aeropress chamber (inverted)

brew_steps.label: Add Water
brew_steps.instruction: Pour all water, then stir gently for 10s

brew_steps.label: Steep
brew_steps.instruction: Let steep undisturbed

brew_steps.label: Flip & Press
brew_steps.instruction: Flip onto mug and press gently over 25s

name: French Press
technique_notes: Add coffee, pour hot water, stir gently. Steep for 4 minutes. Press plunger down slowly and evenly.

brew_steps.label: Add Coffee
brew_steps.instruction: Add coarse coffee grounds to French Press

brew_steps.label: Add Water
brew_steps.instruction: Pour all hot water, then stir gently

brew_steps.label: Steep
brew_steps.instruction: Let steep for 4 minutes

brew_steps.label: Press
brew_steps.instruction: Press plunger down slowly and evenly

name: Moka Pot
technique_notes: Fill base with hot water just below safety valve. Fill basket with coffee, level without tamping. Screw on top. Brew on medium-low heat until gurgling begins. Remove from heat immediately.

brew_steps.label: Fill Base
brew_steps.instruction: Fill base chamber with hot water just below safety valve

brew_steps.label: Fill Basket
brew_steps.instruction: Fill basket with coffee, level without tamping, screw top on

brew_steps.label: Brew
brew_steps.instruction: Place on medium-low heat, brew until gurgling begins

brew_steps.label: Remove
brew_steps.instruction: Remove from heat immediately, cool base under running water to stop extraction

name: Espresso
technique_notes: Distribute grounds evenly in portafilter, tamp firmly with ~15kg pressure. Brew for 25-32s. Aim for 36-40g output from 15-18g dose.

brew_steps.label: Prepare
brew_steps.instruction: Distribute grounds evenly in portafilter, tamp firmly

brew_steps.label: Start Brew
brew_steps.instruction: Lock portafilter and start brew immediately

brew_steps.label: Extraction
brew_steps.instruction: Watch for golden crema, target 25-32s extraction

brew_steps.label: Stop
brew_steps.instruction: Stop brew when target yield is reached

name: Chemex
technique_notes: Use Chemex bonded filters. Bloom with 3x coffee weight for 40s. Pour in slow circles, pausing as water drains. Total brew time 4:00-4:30.

brew_steps.label: Bloom
brew_steps.instruction: Pour 3x coffee weight to bloom, let degas 40s

brew_steps.label: First Pour
brew_steps.instruction: Pour in slow circles, pause as water drains through bed

brew_steps.label: Second Pour
brew_steps.instruction: Continue pouring in circles, maintaining water level

brew_steps.label: Drawdown
brew_steps.instruction: Let bed drain completely, aim for total 4:00-4:30

name: Clever Dripper
technique_notes: Insert filter, rinse. Add coffee and water. Steep for 2:00 with occasional stir at 1:00. Place on mug to drain. Total 3:00-3:30.

brew_steps.label: Prepare
brew_steps.instruction: Insert filter, rinse with hot water, add coffee grounds

brew_steps.label: Add Water
brew_steps.instruction: Pour all water, close lid, start timer

brew_steps.label: Steep
brew_steps.instruction: Let steep, stir gently at 1:00 mark

brew_steps.label: Drain
brew_steps.instruction: Place on mug to drain, let draw down completely
